ladder_note: IC1 Junior -> IC2 -> IC3 Senior -> IC4 Staff -> IC5 Principal. Manager track M1 (front-line) and M2 (manager-of-managers) sit alongside IC4/IC5 for seniority comparison.

candidates.name: Lena Hoffmann
candidates.title: Staff Data Platform Engineer
candidates.notes: Long-tenured on the exact team the new hire is joining. Has mentored two prior new hires with strong ratings.

candidates.name: Tomás Rivera
candidates.title: Senior Data Platform Engineer
candidates.notes: Same team, same level as the hire but tenured > 12mo so eligible. One buddy slot free. One hour offset from CET.

candidates.name: Priya Nair
candidates.title: Senior Data Platform Engineer
candidates.notes: Excellent buddy but already at capacity (2/2). Should be filtered on capacity despite great fit.

candidates.name: Daniel Okafor
candidates.title: Principal Data Platform Engineer
candidates.notes: Same team and available capacity, but on leave through the hire's first two weeks (start 2026-07-06). Filtered on availability.

candidates.name: Sofia Marchetti
candidates.title: Engineering Manager, Data Platform
candidates.notes: The hire's own manager. Eligible on paper, but a buddy should not be the hire's direct manager — call this out as a flag rather than recommend.

candidates.name: Jacob Kim
candidates.title: Senior Analytics Engineer
candidates.notes: Adjacent/sibling team (Analytics Eng works closely with Data Platform). Capacity free, same timezone, shares the climbing interest. Ranks behind eligible same-team peers but ahead of unrelated teams.

candidates.name: Amara Diallo
candidates.title: Data Platform Engineer
candidates.notes: Same team but more junior than the hire (IC2 < IC3) and short tenure. Filtered on the seniority floor.

candidates.name: Wei Chen
candidates.title: Staff Site Reliability Engineer
candidates.notes: Eligible but unrelated team and a 7-hour timezone gap from CET. Should rank low on primary + tiebreakers.

candidates.name: Hannah Becker
candidates.title: Senior Product Manager
candidates.notes: Eligible and great timezone/interest overlap, but a non-engineering function. Ranks below same-team and adjacent-eng-team engineers for a day-to-day technical buddy.
